evaluator_output.reason: Good selection of wireless earbuds with 5 options available, all meeting the user's budget-friendly intent.

final_response:
For the ultimate bang for your buck, look no further than the JBL Vibe 200TWS at just $29. These little champions deliver JBL's signature Pure Bass Sound, making them perfect for anyone dipping their toes into the world of truly wireless audio without breaking the bank. The lightweight, stick-style design is not only comfortable for long listening sessions but also keeps the music flowing all day, making these a steal for budget enthusiasts.

Want something with a bit more punch? The JBL Tune Buds at $49 come with Active Noise Cancellation, so you can zone out in peace. Need better waterproofing? The 1More True Wireless X at $69 offers IPX5 splash resistance for your more adventurous days. Looking for even more battery life? The Sony WF-C500 at $59 boasts up to 10 hours of playtime, ensuring you’ll be grooving longer than ever.
